templates.title: 📧 Informal Email
structure: Opening: How are you? / How's it going?
Paragraph 1: Answer their question or give news
Paragraph 2: Ask them a question or suggest something
Closing: Write back soon! / Hope to hear from you!
Sign-off: Love, / Best wishes, / See you soon,
templates.example:
Hi Alex,

How are you? I'm writing to tell you about my holiday. I went to the beach with my family. We swam every day and ate ice cream. The weather was amazing!

What about you? Did you do anything fun last week?

Write back soon!

Love,
[Your name]

templates.title: 📖 Short Story
structure: Paragraph 1: Set the scene — when, where, who
Paragraph 3: How it ended and how you felt
templates.example:
My Surprising Day

Last Saturday, I was at home when my friend called me. He invited me to go to the new adventure park. I was very excited!

We went on the roller coaster and the water slides. It was amazing! My favourite was the big drop.

At the end of the day, I was tired but very happy. It was the best day of my summer!

templates.title: 🏠 Description of a place/person
structure: Paragraph 1: General introduction — what is it / who is it
Paragraph 3: Why it's special / your opinion
templates.example:
My Favourite Room

My favourite room is my bedroom. It's small but very cosy. There's a bed next to the window and a desk near the door.

On the walls, there are posters of my favourite bands. I also have a shelf with my books. My lamp is blue and it gives a warm light.

I love my bedroom because it's quiet and I can relax there after school.

common_mistakes.note: Para la edad usamos 'to be', no 'to have'.
Adjetivos cortos (1 sílaba) usan -er: easy → easier.
No se combina 'more' con adjetivos cortos.

common_mistakes.wrong: I like very much the pizza.
common_mistakes.note: 'Very much' va al final, no tras el verbo.
